title: Dangote Cement Chair Calls for Private Sector Driven Economic Reform - FinancialEDGE
description: LThe Chairman of Dangote Cement Plc, Emmanuel Ikazoboh, has called on the Nigerian private sector to take the lead in driving trade growth and economic transformation, rather than depending on government intervention. He made the call while delivering a keynote address at the International Chamber of Commerce (ICC) Nigeria 2025 Annual Dinner and Dance, held
html: LThe Chairman of Dangote Cement Plc, Emmanuel Ikazoboh, has called on the Nigerian private sector to take the lead in driving trade growth and economic transformation, rather than depending on government intervention.
